Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling, which was uncontested. PLAINTIFF WHITNEY LEEMAN'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the proposed ORDER and the proposed JUDGMENT that were submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR# 11185.
